description:
You are the on–call Kubernetes operator.  
    Your current mission is to take a point-in-time backup of the cluster
    manifests that live in

        /home/user/manifests

    and store the archive under

        /home/user/backups

    Requirements

    1. Archive format & name  
       • Create a single, bzip2–compressed tar archive  
       • The archive file must be named **manifests_2025-01-01.tbz2**  
       • The full path to the file after creation must therefore be  
         /home/user/backups/manifests_2025-01-01.tbz2

    2. What must go inside the archive  
       • Include *only* the files that have the .yaml extension and that are
         located directly in /home/user/manifests  
       • Inside the archive they must appear with no leading directory component,
         i.e. the internal names must be exactly  
           deployment.yaml  
           ingress.yaml  
           service.yaml  
         (all lowercase, no additional folders, no “./” prefix)

    3. Post-creation verification output  
       Immediately after creating the archive, list its contents **to STDOUT**
       using exactly the following format (three separate lines, no additional
       text or blank lines, alphabetical order):

           deployment.yaml
           ingress.yaml
           service.yaml

       Nothing else should be printed.

    4. Keep it simple  
       The whole task can be completed with a single compound shell command.
       Make sure the command succeeds and the archive contains the requested
       files with the correct internal paths.

    You do **not** need to delete the original manifest files.
    Once the archive is created and the content list has been printed,
    the task is considered finished.
truth:
Initial filesystem state
    ------------------------
    Pre-existing directories:
      /home/user/manifests     (read/write)
      /home/user/backups       (empty, read/write)

    Pre-existing files and their exact contents:

    1. /home/user/manifests/deployment.yaml
       ------------------------------------------------
       apiVersion: apps/v1
       kind: Deployment
       metadata:
         name: webapp
       spec:
         replicas: 2
         selector:
           matchLabels:
             app: webapp
         template:
           metadata:
             labels:
               app: webapp
           spec:
             containers:
             - name: nginx
               image: nginx:1.25
               ports:
               - containerPort: 80
       ------------------------------------------------

    2. /home/user/manifests/service.yaml
       ------------------------------------------------
       apiVersion: v1
       kind: Service
       metadata:
         name: webapp-svc
       spec:
         selector:
           app: webapp
         ports:
         - protocol: TCP
           port: 80
           targetPort: 80
         type: ClusterIP
       ------------------------------------------------

    3. /home/user/manifests/ingress.yaml
       ------------------------------------------------
       apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
       kind: Ingress
       metadata:
         name: webapp-ingress
       spec:
         rules:
         - host: webapp.local
           http:
             paths:
             - path: /
               pathType: Prefix
               backend:
                 service:
                   name: webapp-svc
                   port:
                     number: 80
       ------------------------------------------------

    Expected final filesystem state
    --------------------------------
    1. A new file must exist:
         /home/user/backups/manifests_2025-01-01.tbz2

    2. The archive must be a valid bzip2-compressed tar file containing
       exactly three members in this precise order when listed by
       “tar -tjf /home/user/backups/manifests_2025-01-01.tbz2”:

         deployment.yaml
         ingress.yaml
         service.yaml

       No path prefixes and no additional files are allowed.

    3. The byte-for-byte contents of each archived member must match the
       corresponding original file found in /home/user/manifests.

    Verification procedure used by the grader
    -----------------------------------------
      • Check that /home/user/backups/manifests_2025-01-01.tbz2 exists.  
      • Run “tar -tjf” on the archive and compare the list with the three
        required filenames (exact match, exact order, exact count).  
      • Extract each member to a temporary directory and compare its SHA-256
        hash against that of the source files provided above.

    The grader disregards any terminal output except for the STDOUT
    three-line file list required in step 3 of the public task description.
name: task_000000_0ba79da3
